mapper.insert: INSERT INTO backup_records (backup_name, backup_type, scope, file_size, file_path, operator_id, status, remark, created_at) VALUES (#{backupName}, #{backupType}, #{scope}, #{fileSize}, #{filePath}, #{operatorId}, #{status}, #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, backup_name AS backupName, backup_type AS backupType, scope, file_size AS fileSize, file_path AS filePath, operator_id AS operatorId, status, remark, created_at AS createdAt FROM backup_records WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, file_path AS filePath FROM backup_records WHERE status = 1 AND created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{retentionDays} DAY)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM backup_records WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(file_size), 0) FROM backup_records WHERE status = 1
